overview: Guru Nanak Institutions Technical Campus (GNITC), established in 2001, is a premier autonomous engineering institution located in Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad. It is part of the Guru Nanak Institutions (GNI) group and is recognized for its massive 31-acre lush green campus. The institution is known for its strong academic framework, focus on research through various innovation centers, and high placement records. It offers a wide range of programs across Engineering, Pharmacy, and Management, attracting students from across India and abroad.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade (CGPA 3.41). Major B.Tech programs (CSE, ECE, IT) are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA). Approved by AICTE, PCI (for Pharmacy), and affiliated with JNTU-Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, IT, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for reserved) + TG EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% + TG ICET / CAT / MAT rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI, Embedded Systems, Thermal Engineering)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TG PGECET score
10+2 with PCM/PCB or Diploma in Pharmacy

placements.highestSalary: ₹30.0 LPA - ₹60.0 LPA (Recent high offers from Mu Sigma & Amazon)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted via state-level web counseling (TGCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are based on entrance ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. Counseling Code: GURU.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Results: Mid-May 2026; TG ICET 2026: May 13–14, 2026; Counseling: July 2026.

facilities: Separate In-campus Hostels for Boys and Girls (AC & Non-AC)
Indoor Sports Complex & Outdoor Grounds (Cricket, Football)
Transport (Fleet covering all major suburbs of Hyderabad)
campus.specialNote: GNITC is a part of the UN Academic Impact and is known for its 'Foreign Student Cell' which hosts students from 15+ countries. The campus also features a unique 'Idea Lab' and entrepreneurship cell that assists students in launching startups and obtaining patents.

contact.address: Khanapur Village, Ibrahimpatnam Mandal, Ranga Reddy District, Telangana - 501506
